---
name: 📐 DXF Parsing Issue
about: Report problems with parsing specific DXF files
title: '[DXF] '
labels: dxf, parsing
assignees: ''
---

## 📐 DXF File Information

**File Name**: (e.g., my-warehouse.dxf)

**CAD Software**: (e.g., AutoCAD 2023, SolidWorks, DraftSight)

**DXF Version**: (e.g., R2018, R2000)

**File Size**: (e.g., 2.5 MB)

### 🔍 DXF Structure

Which entities are in the file?

- [ ] LINE
- [ ] CIRCLE
- [ ] ARC
- [ ] LWPOLYLINE
- [ ] POLYLINE
- [ ] TEXT
- [ ] DIMENSION
- [ ] Other: (specify)

### 📊 Entity Counts

- **Total Entities**: (e.g., 150)
- **LINE Entities**: (e.g., 80)
- **CIRCLE Entities**: (e.g., 20)
- **Other Entities**: (specify)

## 🐛 Issue Description

What went wrong when parsing this DXF file?

### Expected Behavior

What should happen when parsing this file?

### Actual Behavior

What actually happened?

### Error Messages

```
Paste any error messages from:
- Browser console
- Backend server logs
- Test output
```

### 📎 Upload DXF File

**Please attach the DXF file** (drag and drop below)

If the file is too large, please:
1. Upload to a file sharing service (Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.)
2. Share the link here
3. Set appropriate permissions

### 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add:
- Screenshot of the DXF file in CAD software
- Screenshot of the error
- Screenshot of the incorrect rendering

### 🔍 Testing

Have you tested with other DXF files?

- [ ] Yes, other files work fine
- [ ] No, this is my first test
- [ ] Yes, but similar issues occur

**Working Files**: List any DXF files that do work correctly

**Failing Files**: List other DXF files with similar issues

### 📝 Additional Notes

Add any other context about the DXF file or parsing issue.

---

### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have attached the DXF file
- [ ] I have specified the CAD software and version
- [ ] I have listed the entity types in the file
- [ ] I have provided error messages and logs
- [ ] I have tested with the sample files in this repository
